title: The Closed Grid Chamber

features.name: wall made of menu-code
features.desc-on-touch: The horizon collapsed into four walls. Every exit is a UI button that renders the same room again.

features.name: screenshot-corner
features.desc-on-touch: Where the render clips have begun to show their edges—a corner where the archive's own diagnostic rendering is visible, unfinished.

features.name: recursive navigation
features.desc-on-touch: A map of this room displayed inside this room, scaled smaller, with another map inside that, depth without distance.

features.name: dusk-band horizon
features.desc-on-touch: Where the gradient sky-render has frozen in place—the blues and magentas of eternal transition, frame-locked at the moment before night.

features.name: collision-glitch cluster
features.desc-on-touch: Where the menu-highway's rendering algorithm hit a paradox—too many exits trying to occupy one space, they've fused into corrupted pixels.

inscription: every route in this room leads back to this room; you have become part of the rendering

file.name: Menu_State_Loop_Recursion_Depth_Unknown.log
file.note: navigation tree corrupted—the archive's own interface collapsed into self-reference. Files report their own reading as coordinates in the space where they're displayed.

exits.label: the blue grid dissolves back into highway horizon
down into another menu level, the nesting continues
into a wall that claims to be an exit
